notes: Morning stack: 07:00 yoga → sequence drills → 08:05–10:05 two classes → more drills → wall passes last. Friday rest (yoga + half-day class only). Sat shooting / Sun running after yoga.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.description:
Carbs + protein for energy

Options:
• Oatmeal + eggs + fruit
• Whole grain toast + peanut butter + banana
• Greek yogurt + granola + berries
• Scrambled eggs + whole wheat toast + orange juice

Tip: Eat 45-60 min before training

meals.name: Pre-Training Snack
meals.description:
Light, easy-to-digest carbs

Options:
• Banana
• Granola bar
• Apple slices
• Small handful of crackers

Tip: Keep it light - training starts soon!

meals.name: Post-Training Recovery
meals.description:
Protein + carbs within 30 min of training

Options:
• Chocolate milk (great recovery drink!)
• Greek yogurt + honey + fruit
• Protein smoothie (banana, milk, peanut butter)
• Turkey + cheese roll-ups + crackers

Tip: This meal is crucial for muscle recovery!

meals.name: Lunch
meals.description:
Balanced plate: protein + carbs + veggies

Options:
• Grilled chicken + rice + steamed broccoli
• Turkey sandwich on whole wheat + side salad
• Pasta with meat sauce + vegetables
• Fish tacos + beans + salad

Plate guide: 1/4 protein, 1/4 carbs, 1/2 vegetables

meals.name: Afternoon Snack
meals.description:
Protein + carbs to sustain energy

Options:
• Apple slices + peanut butter
• Cheese + whole grain crackers
• Trail mix (nuts + dried fruit)
• Hummus + veggie sticks + pita
• Greek yogurt + granola

meals.name: Dinner
meals.description:
Protein + complex carbs + vegetables

Options:
• Grilled salmon + sweet potato + asparagus
• Lean steak + brown rice + mixed vegetables
• Chicken stir-fry + quinoa
• Turkey meatballs + whole wheat pasta + salad

Tip: Eat dinner 2-3 hours before bed for good sleep

sequenceSchedule.notes: a=plyometrics (Mon-Thu), g=ball mastery (Tue/Thu), b/c=coordination (Mon/Wed), e=wall passes (last daily)
